title: G4GADGET Heavy Duty Wire Brush with Grip Handle - Rows Carbon Steel Brush for Cleaning Rust and Heavy Dirt - Ergonomic Handle Grip
features: Time-Saving Cleaning Solution: Includes a long handle paving brush and a block brush to tackle heavy grime and dirt.
Solid Construction: Features a hard metal scraper attached directly to the head for easy removal of stubborn debris.
Ergonomic Handle Grip: Lightweight plastic body with curved grips for extra support and hand protection during cleaning.
Multifunctional Brushes: Perfect for extreme dirt surfaces on concrete, metal, stone, and wood, as well as corrosion removal, weed and moss removal, paint removal, and more.
Heavy-Duty Performance: Designed to handle tough cleaning tasks with ease, making it ideal for home, garage, and workshop use.
